_readme.what_is_this: This is the single content file for the Slingshot Studios website. Edit this file to update any text, add media, or reorder sections. You do NOT need to touch index.html for any content change.
_readme.how_to_edit: Open this file in any text editor (TextEdit on Mac works, but use 'Plain Text' mode, or use VS Code / Notepad). Change any value between quotes. Save the file. Refresh the browser.
rules: Always keep the commas at the end of lines (except the last item in a group).
Text goes between double quotes. Example: "My new title"
To add a new headshot: add a new line like { "file": "headshot_4.jpg", "alt": "Name" } inside the headshots array.
To add a new poster: same pattern inside the posters array.
To add a new music track: copy an existing music block and change the values.
To add a new film: copy an existing film block and change the values.
File names must match exactly what you put in the assets/ folder (case-sensitive).
YouTube IDs are just the part after v= in the URL. Example: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ABC123 → id is ABC123
_readme.section_order: Change the order of items in sectionOrder to reorder sections on the page. Use the exact keys shown.
_readme.logo: Put your logo file in the assets/ folder and set logo.file below. SVG preferred. Set to null to use the built-in icon mark.

site.title: Slingshot Studios
site.description: An independent film collective based in Paris, developing and producing original projects.

logo._note: Set to a filename like 'logo.svg' to use your own logo from the assets/ folder. null uses the built-in icon.

hero._note: headline_options: first item is used. The comma splits it — left side gets serif italic font, right side gets sans. Delete options you don't want.
hero.tagline: Film · Music · Actor Services. Based in Paris.
hero._hero_video_note: Plays silently in background on desktop. Hidden on mobile. Set to null to disable.

films._note: Each film has a 'type': 'own' = fully self-produced by Slingshot. 'collab' = project we contributed to. This controls which section heading it appears under.
films.section_sub: Original work and collaborations — from development to distribution.

items.title: Parasomnia
items.process_note: Shot over three weekends in Paris with a crew of four.

items.title: The Love Ritual
items.process_note: We came in post-production and contributed poster design, editing and score.

items.title: Pupille
items.process_note: Brought in as DOP and composer — collaborated closely with the director throughout.

items.title: Diver's Fortune
items.process_note: Score, sound effects and trailer editing for an independent game project.

music._note: Tracks appear in the order listed. Add new tracks by copying a block. 'file' must be in assets/. 'startAt' is seconds into the track where playback begins (0 = from the start). 'youtubeId' can replace file for streaming — if set, the audio is pulled from YouTube.

actors.section_sub: Headshots and demo reel scenes — directed with a film eye, not a package mentality.
actors._headshots_note: Add headshots by adding items to this array. File must be in assets/. They appear in carousel order.
actors._reels_note: Add reel scenes by adding items to this array. 'file' = mp4 in assets/, 'thumb' = poster jpg in assets/, 'label' = text shown on the card.

post.section_sub: We handle editing, colour grading, sound design, and original music — everything that happens after the shoot. We work from first assembly through to final mix, all in-house.

services.label: Edit
services.title: Assembly & Edit
services.body: From first cut to locked picture — narrative, short-form, game trailers.

services.label: Colour
services.title: Colour Grading
services.body: Cinematic grading that serves the image rather than overwriting it.

services.label: Sound
services.title: Sound Design & Mix
services.body: Sound design, dialogue edit, and final mix for film and game audio.

services.label: Music
services.title: Original Score
services.body: Music for film, short-form content, and games — composed and produced together.

design.section_sub: Film poster design rooted in the image — key art that communicates the world of a project before you press play.
design._posters_note: Add posters by adding items to this array. File must be in assets/. They appear in carousel order (3 side by side on desktop, swipeable on mobile).

about.lead: We're a small film collective based in Paris — making our own work and collaborating with filmmakers, actors, and musicians who have projects worth building.
body: Independent by choice. We stay involved across the whole process — from the first conversation about a script to the final grade. That's how we like to work.
Founded in 2025. We take on a handful of outside projects each year, always selectively. If you have something cooking, reach out early — the earlier we're involved the better.
Noée and Simeon lead the creative and technical work. Aylin keeps everything organised and connected. Fleur handles image, design, and our UK connections.
about._team_note: Edit name, role, and optionally add a photo file. If 'photo' is null, initials are shown instead.

contact.section_sub: Tell us what you're working on — even if it's early.
contact.intro: Drop us a message. We read everything ourselves and get back within a few days.
contact.hours: Any day, by appointment. We're filmmakers — what's a weekend?

footer.tagline: An independent film collective. Based in Paris.

bts._photos_note: Add BTS photos by adding items here. Files go in assets/. Any aspect ratio works — the grid handles it.

impressum._note: Required for European sites. This content appears on your legal.html page (not on the main site). Fill in your details.
